title: Create: Train Track Rail Grinding
description: Adds Rail-Grinding from the Sonic the Hedgehog Series and early-2000s Extreme Sports to Create. Allows you to Grind on the Rails of Train Tracks
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/L4L11C7LZ0)




Rail-Grinding

This mod adds the ability to Ride on Train Tracks by Rail-grinding

Highly configerable mod with FULL support for any version of Steam n' Rails, and Full Sable support allowing you to grind on tracks even on Aeronautic ships. Riding on rails also features momentum based gameplay, maintain speed even while using Elytras or mobility tools from other mods. Rail-grinding is maintained even while crossing dimensions, including modded portals supported by Create.




How to Start Riding the Rails


Either diving boots give you the ability to grind on rails.

You can apply the "Rail Rider" Enchantment to allow any boots to rail-grind.

Controls can be tweaks in the Config.





Bar of Chocolate New Features!


Bar of Chocolate is Finally useful! Giving you extra speed and balance!





Fully compatible with Aeronautics Contraptions and Modded Train Tracks
